ab: yakan kani ama nimangay namen itazogaw si maran nokakyab.
ch: 昨天我和爸爸去拜訪我的叔叔。
en: Yesterday, my father and I visited my uncle.

ab: nimizahza o ai na ni maran.
koan na yamen, nimakava o atep no vahay na kangyan no tong.
ch: 他告訴我們，房子的屋頂破了一個洞。
en: He told us that there was a hole in the roof of his house.

ab: no kapivazay na do atep no vahay am, nimakas do atep a mizahza..
ch: 他在修理屋頂時，從屋頂摔下來了。
en: He fell off the roof while repairing it.

ab: nimapalolo si ama so asisi no baka aka no mamahen a itoro na ji maran
ch: 爸爸帶了牛肉和檳榔給叔叔。
en: My father brought beef and betel nuts for my uncle.

ab: ko macisirisiring ji maran do irirayan, aro na ni ononongan a vazavazay.
ch: 我和叔叔在房間裡聊天，他分享了很多故事。
en: My uncle and I chatted in the room, and he shared many stories.

ab: ko na itaytaydan si maran am, na azwazwain yaken "ka namakarang a apiya so ka mawmawgan"
ch: 我要離開前，叔叔誇我長高了，也變得更帥氣了。
en: Before I left, my uncle praised me for growing taller and becoming more handsome.

ab: koan ko am: si apiya rana o ai mo maran am. mai ka do vahay namen.
ch: 我說：「等叔叔腳好了，下次也來我們家玩。」
en: I said, "When your foot gets better, come to our house next time and visit us."
